segments.text: Steve can't really punish this barrel attack!
segments.original_text: バレルこの攻撃能力なかなかスティーブではとがめられないでしょう

segments.text: And Acolyte's defensive option is shining through!
segments.original_text: 結局ここのアコーラの拒否もまた光るというところか

segments.text: Banana connects! Fair—straight to the KO!
segments.original_text: バナナ当て空前そのまま撃墜

full_text: Steve can't really punish this barrel attack! And Acolyte's defensive option is shining through! Banana connects! Fair—straight to the KO!

corrections.original: バナナアテック打ち前そのまま撃墜
corrections.corrected: バナナ当て空前そのまま撃墜
corrections.rule: Move abbreviation correction (アテック打ち前 → 当て空前)
